framing: Freelance music producer and audio engineer applying to Head of Audio at podcast startup in Berlin

jd.title: Head of Audio
jd.style_note: Vague/culture-first: creative company, emphasis on taste and storytelling, flexible on exact background

requirements.text: You have exceptional ears — you know what great audio sounds like and you can make it happen
5+ years of professional audio production experience (music, podcasts, radio, film, or advertising)
You can manage a team of audio producers and editors while maintaining creative quality standards
You understand podcast-specific production: narrative structure, interview editing, sound design, and mixing for spoken word
Bonus: experience building or managing a podcast studio (technical setup, acoustics, workflow design)
Bonus: experience with audio-first content strategy and audience development

responsibilities: Lead Podimo's audio production team (8 producers and editors) across original podcast programming
Set and maintain audio quality standards for all Podimo Originals (50+ shows in production)
Oversee studio operations at Podimo's Berlin production facility
Collaborate with editorial and content teams on new show development and pilot production
Manage production workflows, scheduling, and freelancer relationships for audio production

expected_output.summary: Freelance music producer and audio engineer with 7 years of experience producing, mixing, and mastering music and audio content in Berlin. Produced 3 albums for independent artists released on Spotify and Apple Music. Recorded and mixed 120+ podcast episodes for 4 German podcast networks. Built and operates private recording studio in Berlin-Kreuzberg. Expert in Pro Tools, Logic Pro, and Ableton Live. No experience managing audio teams or setting production standards at scale. Seeking transition from freelance to full-time audio leadership.

experience.title: Freelance Music Producer & Audio Engineer
bullets: Produced, mixed, and mastered 3 full-length albums and 15+ singles for independent artists across electronic, indie rock, and hip-hop genres
Recorded and mixed 120+ podcast episodes for 4 clients including Spotify-exclusive true crime series 'Mordsache' (German)
Built and operated Studio Klang — private recording studio in Berlin-Kreuzberg (acoustic design, equipment selection, signal chain)
Managed client relationships, project timelines, and freelance audio editors (2-3 per project) across music and podcast projects
Delivered audio branding packages (intro/outro music, sound design, sonic identity) for 6 podcast shows

experience.title: Audio Engineer (Tonmeister contract)
bullets: Engineered live recordings and studio sessions for Deutschlandfunk Kultur's music and culture programming
Mixed radio documentaries and feature programmes for broadcast (stereo and binaural formats)
Operated Lawo mixing console and Pyramix DAW for live-to-air broadcast recording
Managed audio post-production for 40+ radio features including narrative editing, sound design, and final mix

education: BSc (Hons) Audio and Music Technology — University of the West of England (UWE Bristol) (2013-2016)

jd_requirements: 5+ years professional audio music podcasts radio film advertising
manage team audio producers editors creative quality
podcast narrative structure interview editing sound design mixing spoken word
podcast studio technical setup acoustics workflow
deliberate_flaws: No experience managing a permanent audio team (managed 2-3 freelancers per project, not 8+ staff)
No experience setting production standards at scale (50+ shows — freelancer handles 4-6 clients)
No content strategy or audience development experience (produces content, doesn't strategize it)
No experience with podcast platform operations (Podimo is a subscription platform, different from production)
Freelancer — no experience with organisational processes, HR, team performance reviews, or budget management
Music production is primary skill — podcast production is secondary and less experienced
No experience with editorial or show development (produces what clients commission, doesn't develop new shows)
120 podcast episodes across 4 clients is modest — Head of Audio manages 50+ shows simultaneously
German is C1, not native — Podimo creates German-language originals
No experience managing production scheduling across multiple concurrent shows
BA Music Technology is practical, not leadership-oriented — no management training or qualification
